title: An Duong Vuong Founds Au Lac
summary: Thuc Phan An Duong Vuong unified two tribes, established the Au Lac state, and built the solid Co Loa Citadel to protect the country.

slides.text: After the Hung King era, Thuc Phan unified the West Au and Lac Viet tribes to establish the state of Au Lac.
slides.imagePrompt: Thuc Phan unifying West Au and Lac Viet tribes, creating Au Lac kingdom, ancient Vietnamese people celebrating, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: An Duong Vuong chose the Co Loa area to build his citadel. The citadel was built in a unique and solid spiral shape.
slides.imagePrompt: An Duong Vuong standing in front of the construction of Co Loa Citadel, spiral shape walls, ancient architecture, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Here, the King ordered the casting of the Kim Quy magic crossbow, which could take down tens of thousands of invaders with a single shot.
slides.imagePrompt: The Golden Turtle (Kim Quy) giving the magic claw to An Duong Vuong to create the magic crossbow, mystical glow, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Under An Duong Vuong, Au Lac was a strong nation, striking fear into Northern invaders many times.
slides.imagePrompt: The powerful army of Au Lac with magic crossbows guarding the Co Loa citadel, looking strong and brave, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which famous citadel did King An Duong Vuong build?
The state of Au Lac was formed from the unification of which two tribes?
